summary.en: A 6-12 panel comic-style sequence walking a target customer through 'before, during, and after' the moment your idea exists in their life. Discovery via reaction.
summary.zh: 6-12 格漫画式序列,带目标客户走过 "你的 idea 出现在他们生活中之前、之中、之后" 的时刻。通过他们的反应做 Discovery。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Storyboard
